title: What song did Mari Hum in the start of Eva 30
display_title: What song did Mari Hum in the start of Eva 30
wikitext:
[]: What song did Mari Hum in the start of Eva 3.0? Post by lReisenl » Tue May 21, 2013 1:18 pm It sounds slightly familiar to me, but I can't just put my finger on what it is.

[]: Post by Reichu » Tue May 21, 2013 1:21 pm We've got the FAQ for a reason! http://wiki.evageeks.org/Guides:Evangelion_3.33_FAQ#Character_Questions What is Mari singing during the space mission? She is singing "Hitori ja nai no" (「ひとりじゃないの」, "I'm Not Alone"), a 1972 song by Mari Amachi (天地真理).

chunks.content:
Article: What song did Mari Hum in the start of Eva 30
[]: What song did Mari Hum in the start of Eva 3.0? Post by lReisenl » Tue May 21, 2013 1:18 pm It sounds slightly familiar to me, but I can't just put my finger on what it is.

[]: Post by Reichu » Tue May 21, 2013 1:21 pm We've got the FAQ for a reason! http://wiki.evageeks.org/Guides:Evangelion_3.33_FAQ#Character_Questions What is Mari singing during the space mission? She is singing "Hitori ja nai no" (「ひとりじゃないの」, "I'm Not Alone"), a 1972 song by Mari Amachi (天地真理).
